'''Andy Raleigh''' (born 17 March 1981) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer. He played in the [[Super League]] for the [[Huddersfield Giants]], [[Hull Kingston Rovers]] and the [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield Trinity Wildcats]]. He played as a {{rlp|sr}} or as a {{rlp|pr}}.<ref name="Huddersfield Giants 26–20 Leeds Rhinos">{{cite web|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/super_league/8560365.stm|title=Huddersfield Giants 26-20 Leeds Rhinos|publisher=BBC|date=14 March 2010|access-date=15 March 2010|archive-url= https://web.archive.org/web/20100322211949/http://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/super_league/8560365.stm|archive-date= 22 March 2010 |url-status= live}}</ref>

==Background==
Raleigh was born in [[Huddersfield]], [[West Yorkshire]], England.<ref name=BBC09sep05>{{cite web|url=https://news.bbc.co.uk/sport1/hi/rugby_league/super_league/huddersfield/4229116.stm |title=Raleigh seals Huddersfield switch |work=BBC Sport |date=9 September 2005 |access-date=10 April 2024}}</ref> He studied for a BSc in Geography at [[Newcastle University]]  and during his time there played for the university rugby league team and represented the North East, England students and Great Britain students. In his final year at University Andy received the Student Player of the Year Award.

==Club career==
Between 2002 and 2004, Raleigh played for [[Sheffield Eagles]].<ref name=BBC29July2014>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/28545687 |title=Andy Raleigh: Wakefield Wildcats forward to retire after season |work=BBC Sport |date=29 July 2014 |access-date=10 April 2024}}</ref> In November 2004, Raleigh joined [[Hull Kingston Rovers]]. He scored 17 tries in 30 appearances during which time the club won the [[Northern Rail Cup]] and Raleigh was named National League Player of the Year.<ref name=BBC09sep05/><ref name=BBC29July2014/> In September 2005, Raleigh signed a two-year deal to join [[Huddersfield Giants]] ahead of the 2006 season.<ref name=BBC09sep05/> Raleigh played for Huddersfield in the [[2006 Challenge Cup]] Final at {{rlp|sr}} against [[St Helens R.F.C.|St. Helens]] but the Giants lost 12–42.<ref>{{cite web|url=http://www.rleague.com/db/index.php?id=80375 |title=Match Summary and Details: 2006 Challenge Cup |website=rleague.com |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20071001045703/http://www.rleague.com/db/index.php?id=80375 |archive-date=1 October 2007}}</ref> In October 2011, Raleigh joined Wakefield Trinity Wildcats on a two-year deal.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/15220191 |title=Giants sign Aaron Murphy as Raleigh and Kirmond move on |work=BBC Sport |date=7 October 2011 |access-date=10 April 2024}}</ref> Raleigh announced his retirement at the end of the 2014 season.<ref name=BBC29July2014/>
